def build_metric_name(user_id, path):
    metric_name = f"requests_{user_id}_{path}"
    counter(metric_name)
    return metric_name


def annotate_span(user_id, path):
    tracer.set_attribute("user_id", user_id)
    tracer.set_attribute("path", path)


def emit_metrics(items):
    for item in items:
        counter.inc()


def health_ready():
    return requests.get("https://status.internal/ready")


def sync_records(order_id):
    logger.info("processing order")
    counter.inc()
    tracer.start_span("sync-records")
    return order_id
